patterns.description_statistical: When ci events occur, git.dispersion is systematically increased (effect size d=0.32, treated=41, control=15958).
When deployment events occur, git.dispersion is systematically increased (effect size d=0.42, treated=177, control=15326).
When dependency events occur, git.dispersion is systematically increased (effect size d=0.44, treated=8707, control=15247).
When deployment events occur, git.cochange_novelty_ratio is systematically decreased (effect size d=-0.77, treated=20, control=24044).
When ci events occur, git.files_touched is systematically increased (effect size d=0.22, treated=108, control=3359).
Signals git.files_touched and deployment.release_cadence_hours co-deviate 1.6x more than expected by chance across 4 temporally-aligned observations (of 8 shared 24h windows, lift=1.60).
When ci events occur, git.change_locality is systematically decreased (effect size d=-0.40, treated=33, control=2380).
When ci events occur, git.dispersion is systematically decreased (effect size d=-0.46, treated=51, control=3127).
When ci events occur, git.cochange_novelty_ratio is systematically decreased (effect size d=-0.65, treated=21, control=20095).
Signals dependency.dependency_count and deployment.release_cadence_hours co-deviate 1.6x more than expected by chance across 3 temporally-aligned observations (of 8 shared 24h windows, lift=1.60).
Signals git.change_locality and ci.run_duration co-occur with correlation 0.32 across 12 temporally-aligned observations (of 35 shared 24h windows).
When ci events occur, git.cochange_novelty_ratio is systematically increased (effect size d=0.44, treated=11, control=4734).
When dependency events occur, git.dispersion is systematically decreased (effect size d=-0.34, treated=3011, control=903).
When deployment events occur, git.change_locality is systematically increased (effect size d=0.43, treated=22, control=15774).
Signals ci.run_duration and dependency.dependency_count co-deviate 1.6x more than expected by chance across 5 commit-aligned observations (of 33 shared commits, lift=1.62).
Signals git.dispersion and ci.run_duration co-occur with correlation -0.54 across 8 temporally-aligned observations (of 19 shared 24h windows).
Signals git.files_touched and ci.run_duration co-deviate 1.5x more than expected by chance across 5 commit-aligned observations (of 31 shared commits, lift=1.52).
When dependency events occur, git.change_locality is systematically increased (effect size d=0.42, treated=10569, control=379).
When dependency events occur, git.cochange_novelty_ratio is systematically decreased (effect size d=-0.22, treated=5016, control=310).
When deployment events occur, git.files_touched is systematically increased (effect size d=0.28, treated=93, control=16958).
When ci events occur, git.change_locality is systematically increased (effect size d=0.52, treated=8, control=34059).
Signals git.change_locality and ci.run_duration co-occur with correlation 0.38 across 10 temporally-aligned observations (of 18 shared 24h windows).
When dependency events occur, git.change_locality is systematically decreased (effect size d=-0.26, treated=734, control=1072).
Signals git.dispersion and deployment.release_cadence_hours co-deviate 1.6x more than expected by chance across 8 temporally-aligned observations (of 37 shared 24h windows, lift=1.64).
Signals dependency.dependency_count and deployment.release_cadence_hours co-occur with correlation 0.33 across 9 temporally-aligned observations (of 68 shared 24h windows).
Signals git.change_locality and deployment.release_cadence_hours co-occur with correlation -0.35 across 4 temporally-aligned observations (of 34 shared 24h windows).
Signals git.cochange_novelty_ratio and ci.run_duration co-deviate 1.5x more than expected by chance across 6 temporally-aligned observations (of 30 shared 24h windows, lift=1.50).
When deployment events occur, git.cochange_novelty_ratio is systematically increased (effect size d=0.27, treated=5, control=1632).
When dependency events occur, git.files_touched is systematically decreased (effect size d=-0.21, treated=3037, control=907).
When deployment events occur, git.dispersion is systematically decreased (effect size d=-0.42, treated=149, control=8869).
Signals git.change_locality and config.resource_type_count co-deviate 2.3x more than expected by chance across 52 commit-aligned observations (of 2920 shared commits, lift=2.26).
When config events occur, git.change_locality is systematically increased (effect size d=0.64, treated=29, control=34718).
Signals git.files_touched and deployment.release_cadence_hours co-occur with correlation -0.38 across 20 temporally-aligned observations (of 67 shared 24h windows).
Signals git.dispersion and deployment.release_cadence_hours co-deviate 1.6x more than expected by chance across 18 temporally-aligned observations (of 65 shared 24h windows, lift=1.57).
When deployment events occur, git.change_locality is systematically decreased (effect size d=-0.25, treated=15, control=2447).
When dependency events occur, git.cochange_novelty_ratio is systematically increased (effect size d=0.21, treated=10, control=224).
Signals git.dispersion and dependency.dependency_count co-occur with correlation -0.42 across 6 commit-aligned observations (of 111 shared commits).
Signals ci.run_duration and dependency.dependency_count co-occur with correlation -0.50 across 7 commit-aligned observations (of 22 shared commits).
Signals git.change_locality and ci.run_failed co-occur with correlation -0.66 across 6 temporally-aligned observations (of 11 shared 24h windows).
Signals git.cochange_novelty_ratio and ci.run_duration co-occur with correlation -0.40 across 5 temporally-aligned observations (of 14 shared 24h windows).
Signals git.files_touched and ci.run_duration co-occur with correlation 0.38 across 4 commit-aligned observations (of 26 shared commits).
Signals git.dispersion and ci.run_duration co-occur with correlation 0.46 across 4 commit-aligned observations (of 25 shared commits).
Signals git.files_touched and ci.run_failed co-occur with correlation 0.36 across 3 commit-aligned observations (of 15 shared commits).
Signals git.cochange_novelty_ratio and deployment.release_cadence_hours co-deviate 1.5x more than expected by chance across 3 temporally-aligned observations (of 18 shared 24h windows, lift=1.50).
